name: nexus-code-tooling
description: Project-local Claude Code install for the nexus monitor. Spawn surfaces resolve $CLAUDE_BIN against node_modules/.bin/claude. NOTE: the @anthropic-ai/claude-code version below is a MAINTAINER-MANAGED VETTED FLOOR for initial setup only (fresh install / fresh clone with no operator-local pin), advanced deliberately (>=1 day stable, bundled) — NOT a per-release pin. A successful gated cc-update advances the operator-LOCAL pin (monitor/.state/cc-version-local, gitignored) without touching this file. See monitor/_cc-version.sh and skills/nexus.cc-update/GUIDE.md.
